scripts.test:unit: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const env = { ...process.env, NODE_OPTIONS: [process.env.NODE_OPTIONS, '--experimental-vm-modules'].filter(Boolean).join(' ') }; const r = spawnSync(process.execPath, ['./node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js', '--runInBand', '--testPathIgnorePatterns', 'tests/integration'], { stdio: 'inherit', env }); process.exit(r.status ?? 1);"
scripts.test:integration: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const env = { ...process.env, NODE_ENV: 'test', TEST_MONGODB_URI: process.env.TEST_MONGODB_URI || 'mongodb://127.0.0.1:27017/meroghar_integration_test', NODE_OPTIONS: [process.env.NODE_OPTIONS, '--experimental-vm-modules'].filter(Boolean).join(' ') }; const r = spawnSync(process.execPath, ['./node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js', 'tests/integration', '--runInBand'], { stdio: 'inherit', env }); process.exit(r.status ?? 1);"
scripts.test:all: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const env = { ...process.env, NODE_ENV: 'test', TEST_MONGODB_URI: process.env.TEST_MONGODB_URI || 'mongodb://127.0.0.1:27017/meroghar_integration_test', NODE_OPTIONS: [process.env.NODE_OPTIONS, '--experimental-vm-modules'].filter(Boolean).join(' ') }; const r = spawnSync(process.execPath, ['./node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js', '--runInBand'], { stdio: 'inherit', env }); process.exit(r.status ?? 1);"
